description_long: This is a fictional, futuristic fighter airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage and a pointed nose cone. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the midsection, each equipped with cylindrical engines and laser cannon-like protrusions at the tips. The body is primarily light gray with red and yellow accent markings, and the engines and weaponry are detailed with dark metallic tones. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a dark canopy, and appears to be single-seat. The tail section is compact, featuring a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The overall design is reminiscent of a space combat craft, with a robust, metallic exterior and visible panel lines.
description: A sleek, futuristic fighter airplane with straight mid-mounted wings, cylindrical engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The body is light gray with red accents and detailed weaponry on the wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical arrangement of engines and wing-mounted weaponry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the straight, mid-mounted wings with visible engines and cannons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, tail stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wing and weapon configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same fuselage, wing, and engine details from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and mounted weaponry at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted in pairs on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, not visibly extended in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
